content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 2.1 Claims ↔ code — "offline" and "export as PDF" claims match implementation: LocalStore.swift uses only on-device Documents storage with no networking (App/LocalStore.swift:1-6), and PDFExporter.swift implements PDF rendering via UIGraphicsPDFRenderer (App/PDFExporter.swift:1-15), consistent with description.txt claims.
